jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Fyers
jsonLd.description:
Fyers is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!
